text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Didn't even get onto the scoreboard. Someone
dig me a hole to hide in...
choice_data_list: At least you gave it your all.
We can't afford to waste time dragging our feet.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...!
Now those are some words of wisdom!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I went all out, yet I still lost 'cause I simply wasn't
strong enough. That's somethin' I gotta face up
to.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Even though I'm a total screwup, ya never stop
lookin' out for me, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Even though I'm a total screwup, ya never stop
lookin' out for me, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right! Ya gotta make me stronger so that next
time, I can return at the head of the pack! I'm
countin' on ya!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh, ya got that right, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh, ya got that right, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Runnin' away with my tail between my legs is no
way for an Edo girl to behave!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win for sure next time! So hurry up and
tell me what I gotta do!
